data.name: Headspace
data.detailed_description:
[DEVELOPER NOTE: Hey, I'm DoctorLoops! Headspace was a game I privately worked on as a fun hobby, but when my webcomic started getting big, I eventually had to abandon game development. Rather than delete Headspace, I wanted to publish the content that I was able to finish so everyone can play it! Even though the game is unfinished, I hope you enjoy what I was able to make!]

-

  • Arrow Keys: Movement

  • Z key: Confirm/Interact

  • X key: Cancel/Pause

  • Shift: Sprint

  • Inspect everything! You never know when you might find something...

-

"After an electrical accident at your computer, you suddenly find yourself trapped inside your own mind! To make things worse, thanks to your mind-numbing job and over-reliance on the internet, your mind is creatively bankrupt - bleak nothingness as far as the eye can see, while malicious Dark Thoughts roam the depths of your subconscious. With the power of Inspiration, your lewd Fantasies, and long-lost Memories, there might just be a way to repair your broken mind and escape the confines of your Headspace!

Solve puzzles while traversing the realm of your mind and battle against dangerous Dark Thoughts! Then come home and give your wife a smooch. 

Your mind is a pretty sexual place, but thankfully, so are all the denizens of your thoughts! Help them out and maybe they'll reward you (at least, the ones that aren't trying to end you!)

-

[DEVELOPER NOTE (again): Hey, I'm DoctorLoops! Headspace was a game I privately worked on as a fun hobby, but when my webcomic started getting big, I eventually had to abandon game development. Rather than delete Headspace, I wanted to publish the content that I was able to finish so everyone can try it! Even though the game is unfinished, I hope you enjoy what I was able to make!]

data.short_description: A NSFW Adventure-RPG where you either subdue or seduce the various denizens of your imagination, all while trying to remember who you are. Can you escape the confines of your Headspace?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7-10, but I believe 10 is ideal
  • 處理器: A decent one
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Able to run RPG Maker MV, basically
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
